delicious wild black cherries ripen early-mid august! all along the fence at the bottom left compared to the cemetery entrance, near federal st and mountfort st.

Added August 12th, 2020 - Oregon Crabapple and Washington Hawthorn trees fruiting near the center
Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Take path to the pet cemetery. Bushes of blackberries on both sides of trail. Access: Public.

many raspberry bushes all along the path. one really big patch in this general area. not the best quality (though i have high standards for a berry) but a solid city fruit Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
Four serviceberry shrubs in the Marada Adams Park on Wilson St. They are fruiting for about a week or two around the end of June. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
